mapper.insert: insert into sys_rag_audit_log ( user_id, user_name, query_text, group_codes, scope_codes, metadata_filter, allow_access, deny_reasons, cost_time, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{queryText}, #{groupCodes}, #{scopeCodes}, #{metadataFilter}, #{allowAccess}, #{denyReasons}, #{costTime}, sysdate() )
